headline: Trump 🍊👑 inks Iran DEAL 🏆 Sunday while Tehran 🤔 says 'NOT TODAY' 🙅‍♂️
text: Trump 🍊👑 SLAMS the DOUBTERS 🤡 with a Sunday SIGNING 📜🔥 while Tehran 🕌 says 'WAIT FOR IT' ⏳ and 'NOT TOMORROW' 😤! The STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🛳️💧 gonna be OPEN TO ALL 👐 like a 24/7 DRIVE-THRU 🍔🚗 once the ink dries ✍️💦! Pakistan 🇵🇰 the MEDIATOR MIDDLEMAN 🕴️🔌 says the E-SIGNING 📲✍️ is dropping in 24 HOURS ⏰ like a surprise ALBUM DROP 🎤💿! Iranian SPOKESMAN Baghaei 🗣️🕌 throws SHADE 🌑: 'We gotta SEE about the DATE 📅 but it AIN'T tomorrow' 🙅‍♂️! Trump hits back on TRUTH SOCIAL 📱👑: 'The DEAL is SCHEDULED TOMORROW 📆, then HORMUZ OPENS WIDE 🌊🚪!' He teases the 'NUCLEAR DUST' ☢️🧹 cleanup when things CHILL OUT ❄️😌 and promises to YEET it later 🗑️💥! Iran swears the PROGRAM is just for ELECTRICITY ⚡🔌 and RESEARCH 🔬📚, not BOMBS 💣 – Western countries side-eyeing like it's the ULTIMATE SIDE QUEST 🕹️👀! Trump warns: if it DON'T WORK SMOOTH 🧈😤, 'ULTIMATE ALTERNATIVE' ☢️😬 is on DECK (pray it STAYS ON THE BENCH 🏀🪑)! Pakistan PM Sharif 🧔🇵🇰 flexes 'CLOSER THAN EVER' 📏🔥 and readies for the E-SIGNING 📲 then TECH TALKS next WEEK 🗓️💼! Iran's Araghchi 🗣️🤝 says the DEAL ends ISRAEL-HEZBOLLAH BEEF 🥩⚔️, REOPENS HORMUZ 🚪🌊 and LIFTS the US BLOCKADE 🚫➡️✅! Nuclear CHATS start LATER 🗣️☢️, ECON BENEFITS depend on TEHRAN playing NICE 🤝💰! War kicked off with US-ISRAEL STRIKES on Feb 28 💥📅, Iran clapped back like a TIT-FOR-TAT RAP BATTLE 🎤🔄 and SHUT HORMUZ like a BAD CLUB 🚪❌! Even after APRIL CEASEFIRE 🕊️, they traded SHOTS like an AWKWARD FAMILY TEXT 💬🔫! Now it's all about that SWEET, SWEET PEACE DEAL 🍭✌️ – fingers CROSSED it STICKS this time 🤞🔥!
